summary: 2026-06-08 11:34:53 PDT: The focus-window-pin fix is correct for the reviewed path. `NumberInput` now records the focus-time string and only calls `onCommit` when the draft differs, so an untouched attendee-count field no longer pins live tracking if `liveCount` changes during focus. I found no regression in the shared `NumberInput` behavior for the rate or multiplier fields from this change.
